_comment: LTE feature_context.json template — fill in for each trial.
_instructions: 1. Replace trial_id, rc3_label, rc4_label, feature_name, feature_doc, mechanism_summary.
2. For t1_kpis, the 'col' value MUST match the KPI name field in RC3_FEAT/RC4_FEAT arrays.
Example: if RC3_FEAT has ('ERAB Retain. Fail', ...), use col = 'ERAB Retain. Fail'.
3. Set higher_bad: true if larger value = degradation (fail ratio, delay, BLER).
false if smaller value = degradation (throughput, SR, sleep ratio).
4. category: mechanism | outcome | quality | watchdog | context.
5. No t1_es_kpis for LTE — energy KPIs come from the same extract, not a separate ES file.
6. Save as feature_context.json in the same directory as build_stats_report_template.py.
mechanism_summary: One-sentence description of what the feature changes at the radio/scheduling level.

t1_kpis.col: KPI name as in RC3_FEAT (primary mechanism indicator)
KPI name as in RC3_FEAT (expected outcome KPI)
KPI name as in RC3_FEAT (watchdog KPI)
KPI name as in RC3_FEAT (traffic context)
